scenarios.prompt: Run /test-app on openregister in single mode
scenarios.expected: Should test basic functionality as single agent
assertions: Does NOT spawn parallel agents in single mode

scenarios.prompt: Run /test-app on openregister with all perspectives
assertions: Spawns functional, UX, performance, accessibility, security, API agents

scenarios.prompt: Run /test-app on an app that has test scenarios defined in openspec/
scenarios.setup: App has TS-001.md through TS-005.md in test scenarios
scenarios.expected: Should load and execute existing scenarios
